title: A Kitten's Fancy
content:
The Kitten mews outside the Door,
         The Cat-bird in the Tree,
    The Sea-mew mews upon the Shore,
         The Catfish in the Sea.

    The Emu with his feathers queer
         Is mewing in the Zoo.
    Why is it that I never hear
         A Pussy-willow mew?
meaning:
Oliver Herford's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Kitten's Fancy"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
